summary: Superb audience tape of a summer ’89 show with a smoking The Other One, stellar China>Rider and beautiful Uncle John’s Band solos.
review: The recording is an outstanding audience capture – crisp stereo, wide dynamic range and a palpable sense of being in the venue. Musically the concert shines with a killer second‑set featuring a blazing The Other One and a gorgeous China Cat Sunflower → I Know You Rider, while Jerry, Brent, Phil and Bobby all deliver top‑flight performances.

ai_rating.rationale: The majority of reviews (8 out of 9) give 4–5 stars and praise both the performance and recording; comments are consistent and detailed, indicating an exceptional show with excellent audience‑recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Great stereo image and dynamic range praised by multiple reviewers; a few note the levels could be a touch higher, but overall the tape is clear, crisp and immersive.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider
show_quality.setlist_flow: A classic second set with a greatest‑hits feel; the first set offers a solid mix, and the energy stays high throughout the summer ’89 tour.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Described as having fun, delivering beautiful, poignant solos and strong stage presence.
band_member_comments.Phil: Praised for stepping up with backing vocals and solid bass work.
band_member_comments.Bob: Bobby is noted as "pretty much on" throughout the performance.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent receives high marks for great keyboard playing and full integration into the band.
